title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
